sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتِ الأُمُّ أَنْ تُنَظِّمَ مَصَارِيفَ البَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je htjela organizovati kućne troškove.
sentences.translationEn: The mother wanted to organize the household expenses.
She wrote a list of necessary items.

sentences.arabic: قَسَّمَتِ النُّقُودَ بَيْنَ الأَكْلِ وَالمَلَابِسِ وَغَيْرِهَا.
sentences.translation: Podijelila je novac između hrane, odjeće i ostalog.
sentences.translationEn: She divided the money between food, clothes, and other things.

sentences.arabic: بِهَذِهِ الطَّرِيقَةِ لَمْ تُنْفِقْ أَكْثَرَ مِمَّا عِنْدَهَا.
sentences.translation: Na ovaj način nije potrošila više nego što ima.
sentences.translationEn: This way she did not spend more than she had.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ أَبُو الأُسْرَةِ سَعِيدًا بِهَذَا التَّنْظِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Otac porodice je bio sretan zbog ovog organiziranja.
sentences.translationEn: The head of the family was happy with this organization.
